101: They must learn to find joy in life; such children should be praised from early childhood and accustomed to work so they do not grow lazy. Laziness can hold them back from reaching their goals. These are people from another planet, given many karmic lessons. Their life is difficult and tinged with sorrow. From childhood they need to be taught to enjoy life. A leader, an innovator, a pioneer, ambitious in career, always in search of something new, independent, disliking anyone else's superiority; usually domineering, they achieve their goals.
11: They must learn to find joy in life; such children should be praised from early childhood and accustomed to work so they do not grow lazy. Laziness can hold them back from reaching their goals. 112: This is the combination of the House of Romanov, born aristocrats. If guided correctly, these people can hold high positions; they tend to walk with a curved spine. They possess a natural nobility, and a child must be educated from early childhood (without education, the child risks achieving nothing in life). They should work in science and in fields where the mind is constantly engaged. If a person is nurtured and developed from childhood, they will reach great heights in life. Their work should be intellectual, and they should build relationships only with grateful people. There is a risk of losing all their money after 40. Decisive, cool-headed, the process matters more to them than the result. They thrive on endless results, work for themselves, and dislike superiority in others. Energetic, they achieve their goals.
123: A tendency toward envy and deceit when life remains unfulfilled. A child must be taught from early years not to envy. If there are a 3 and a 5 in the matrix, there is a clear predisposition toward medicine. These are very envious people with a low level of consciousness. They always want to deceive. As researchers, they ignite quickly and burn out just as fast. Inflated self-esteem and frequent mood swings.
134:
A risk of gambling addiction; card players, casino-goers, card sharps. Such people can lead others into deceit at every step, and the truth is hard to draw out of them. They can also learn languages, work in journalism, become orators. Recommendations: from childhood, tell them that gambling machines are bad, and cultivate spirituality, especially in boys. Their professional direction lies through speech; the throat chakra is the most active.
Teach them to play intelligent, wholesome games. Card sharps, they will deceive you at every step. They have no truth of their own; they say whatever is convenient. That is why they can be taught languages, become orators, work in journalism. Practical and persistent in their work, diplomatic. Yet at the same time gambling-prone, fond of adventurous escapades. A dreamer, in a word, a gambler. Such children must be raised with the firm rule that "taking what belongs to others is forbidden."
145:
Indigo children (if a child, then a very clever prodigy; give them plenty of knowledge, they will grasp it all), a dual nature (they may deceive), excellent doctors and teachers, with an innate cunning; talented children (they should be treated with care). They are not afraid to sleep without a light, they may choose several professions; beware that after 40 there may be a downfall (in business, in health, in career) and a risk of cancer.
They love to take risks; before 40 they may found several businesses, and after 40 lose it all (a sharp downfall in business and career). Warm-hearted, responsive, subtly perceptive, beautiful, artistic, freedom-loving peacemakers. They often choose the professions of psychologist or doctor. As Indigo people, they absorb information very well. As a rule, they do not need to be told things several times; they remember and grasp everything at once.
156: A sign of power and money, born managers. These people have compassion and give money for worthy needs; they have their own truth, earn large sums of money, love crowds and public attention, and possess creative abilities. If a person is nurtured and developed from childhood, they will reach great heights in life. Their work should be intellectual, and they should build relationships only with grateful people. There is a risk of losing all their money after 40. A great worker who knows how to earn money. Powerful and calculating, they know how to make people submit. They dislike superiority in others.
167: A sign of spirituality, financial abundance, and personal happiness. Such people are prone to envy; only working for themselves suits them. Good parents, they carry the whole household on their shoulders, they love and tend to their home; for a woman it is a sign of domesticity. These people have few ideas of their own; they may take others' goals and ideas and later pass them off as their own. They need to stand in positions of power and engage in physical labor. Artistic, charismatic, charming personalities. They stand firmly on their feet, hardworking, down-to-earth, true workaholics.
178: A sign of spirituality and personal happiness; luck is present in their lives one hundred percent. A leaning toward greed, they dislike giving away what is theirs. For them, family and spirituality come first. A person to whom the material matters more than the spiritual. Lucky, charming, with a good business instinct.
189: Achieving goals through spirituality. Luck is present one hundred percent; they love to show themselves off, though it is not always appropriate. People who bring progress to the earth. Weak sides: self-sacrifice, but if there is no 2 and 5, self-sacrifice is absent. From among them come good officials, scientists, singers, showmen — in short, anywhere they can put themselves on display. Achieving goals through spirituality. Lucky ones, one hundred percent. They love to show themselves off where it is not always appropriate. People who bring progress to planet Earth. Good officials, teachers, singers, and showmen. Any profession where they can display themselves. A person who thirsts for new knowledge, good analysts; from such people come the best editors, commentators, and journalists.
1910: A sign of career, the ability to command people and give clear orders. They gain fame through spiritual practices and study. In life they achieve everything by themselves. 1910 — if there are many 11111-11111, they are commanders, taking everything by boldness and bravado. If 1, 11, 111, then they are quiet and calm, the gray cardinals.
202:
A sign of wealth and of slaying; these people must develop spirituality, for great sums of money will always be in their hands. Very good allies and partners. Children with this combination are recommended for tai chi and aikido. If there is no 3 — for chess. These people are prone to being vengeful.
If a young man and a young woman both have the 202 code, their compatibility is difficult; they need to learn to hear and understand each other. Good parents, entrepreneurs, and businesspeople. If there is no 3 and 7 — cool-headed, and they can work in secret and similar structures. And one must stay on guard with them. Sport, the career of a performer, politics, and the creative path suit them excellently. If a person is nurtured and developed from childhood, they will reach great heights in life. Their work should be intellectual, and they should build relationships only with grateful people. There is a risk of losing all their money after 40. Emotional, they take crises hard, remember grievances for a long time, and adapt to anyone. They quickly find common ground with those around them — a good mediator who can mend relationships between others. A communicator.
213:
These are patrons of the arts, people who gladly share what they have. More often a rise after 40. These people help everyone and do good. They should hold leadership positions. In their personal life, men are prone to a dissolute lifestyle. Generous people, they yield in one thing, but then it comes back to them from elsewhere. They must not be stingy, otherwise the financial flow is cut off. An analytical mind; mathematics and medicine suit them well, or any helping profession. If a person is nurtured and developed from childhood, they will reach great heights in life.
Their work should be intellectual, and they should build relationships only with grateful people. There is a risk of losing all their money after 40. The person has an intellectually developed ability to seek truth, seeks friendship, communicates warmly. They forever doubt. Peacemakers, they often engage in charity and patronage of the arts.

224:
A sign of a powerful energy healer; they have very strong energy and charm. Good physical abilities, flexibility, and suppleness. In sport they can achieve fine results. Born orators, they have beautiful speech. They are hard to catch in a lie and possess artistic talents. They have good taste in clothing. They will convince you of their rightness — abilities, flexibility, and suppleness. In sport they can achieve success. Such people should not always be trusted, and one must stay on guard with them. Sport, the career of a performer, politics, and the creative path suit them excellently.
In sport they can achieve fine results. Very charming, and you cannot catch them in a lie. They should not be trusted. Suitable professions — politician and performer. A bright personality with leadership abilities, a good orator who can hold the attention of listeners. Communicators, charming, hardworking. Sociable — which is why among such signs there are many Olympic athletes, champions, salespeople, fascinating people.
235:
A strong sign of healing; with such signs are born natural painters, actors, teachers. These are truly great people who bring the world goodness, joy, and prosperity. They have high intellectual abilities from the very moment of birth. In terms of personal life — a leaning toward a dissolute lifestyle. With money they like to economize, they dislike paying their way materially, believing that mere contact with them is priceless. Morally they give a great deal, and gladly share their knowledge. Energetic contactors, they have a strong connection with the cosmos. The same connection with the cosmos is present in 325, 358. They love beautiful things. A tendency to practice black magic. These people bring prosperity to planet Earth. In personal life they are wanderers and may be unfaithful if the temperament is 6/7. It is undesirable for them to wear silver, only gold. They love to wear beautiful things and to practice black magic.
With money — greedy, but they gladly share their knowledge. Gentle, compassionate, freedom-loving, fond of adventure. From such people come many doctors, teachers, psychologists, numerologists, public figures, foretellers, healers, who can let others' pain pass through themselves.
246: The signs 202, 246, 268, 314 should not always be trusted in business — a tendency to set you up and deceive, though not all of them. Drawn to power and great labor. A risk of letting you down in business. Workaholics, scrupulous, able to see matters through to the end, able to lead, give orders, build a business successfully on their own; they will never live in want, and their material standing will always be above average. Calculating. Often tight-fisted, they dislike lending money. Diplomatic, yet within their own circle they often speak ill of those around them; a cult of family is frequently present. As a rule, they have many children. They know what hard work means.
257: A sign of artistry; they can imitate other people; in their personal life, a leaning toward a dissolute lifestyle. Very proper and meticulous, with a tendency to make spontaneous purchases and spend a lot of money. If there are many 77 or more, a desire to achieve goals by boldness. If there is a 4, important secrets can be entrusted to them; if there is no 4, all secrets may be revealed. A sign of artistry, they can imitate other people. In personal life — unfaithful when the temperament is 6/7. Reckless, even carefree people, gambling-prone, prone to falling in love, cheerful, sincere, able to rejoice in another's success. Artistry; they enjoy universal favor. They not infrequently show a passion for clothing, capable of spending large sums in shops; in a word, shopaholics and performers.
268: A sign of business; they have strong luck in money and diligence. If you hire such a person, the business will go better. Good accountants and financiers. But once they rise, they are hard to trust — they may deceive. A sign of business and great luck. The person is fortunate. If you hire them, the business will climb upward. As a rule, successful businesspeople, hardworking, practical, with strong business qualities, energetic and lucky; excellent performers both in business and in personal life. Very good deputies, a leader, a reliable person.
279:
People who are meant to bring progress to this earth. By nature somewhat harsh and very stubborn. Dictators within their own family, they always see 17-20 years ahead. They can bring knowledge that does not yet exist on earth. With those around them they often display their self-sacrifice. By nature harsh and sometimes dictatorial. They possess knowledge that does not yet exist on the planet, so it is important for them to keep developing. A person who leaves their mark on an era. An idealist, quick to grasp thoughts.
There is self-sacrifice in their character, magnanimity, strong analytical abilities; they know how to rejoice in the success of others. Successful strategists. A sign of progress. But they like to keep everything under their own control.
2810:

A sign of fame and career. Here the support of one's family line and relatives is important. A career must be made before the age of 28.
2911: A sign of royal ambitions. For these people it is important to choose one profession and move forward in it. In family life they may display tyranny and despotism.

336: A sign of the god of commerce, a code of wealth, very thrifty and house-proud people. They must practice financial honesty and not steal. Then all will go well for them. Workaholics, scrupulous, able to see matters through to the end, able to lead, give orders, successful, able to build a business on their own. They will never live in want, with material standing above average. Calculating, often tight-fisted. They dislike lending money. They have a fine understanding of art, good designers, with good taste; usually they do not wear fake things. They know how to live beautifully on their own. They love to wear expensive or quality things. Diplomatic in business; in relationships within their own circle they may speak ill of those around them. They often have many unusual ideas.
347:
A sign of an intriguer; in family life — soft to lie on, but hard to sleep on. A genius of intrigue, fond of dressing beautifully, possessing great charm. Outwardly attractive, they can mimic people, tell jokes well, and imitate others. Artistic — born designers, singers, comedians, impersonators, showmen. A universal favorite, with good charm, captivating in their conduct, especially in their inventiveness; adventurous, fond of intrigue.
Gambling-prone. They dress tastefully and beautifully, shopaholics, full of artistry. They love to make merry and often pass off wishful thinking as deeds.
358:
Born psychologists, numerologists, teachers, doctors. They possess clairvoyance, can make contact with spirits and be mediums. In personal life, a leaning toward a dissolute way of life.
A sign of clairvoyance, they can foretell the future and see prophetic dreams. They have a predisposition to alcoholism, so they must stay alert. Both men and women love them. They usually have beautiful large eyes. They can heal; if there is a 4, they should go into medicine. Good teachers. Talented, with good intuition, warm-hearted, kind, soulful, lucky.
369:
People who bring progress to the earth, they often sacrifice themselves, and because of this they may fail to arrange their personal life. By nature somewhat harsh, they may display despotism. They view the world soberly and do not lose their heads in a difficult situation.
They have strong self-control. They need to work in the intellectual sphere, to be inventors. By nature often despotic. Talented, workaholics, analysts, able to do the work of two; genius is laid within them.
3710:
A sign of career, the ability to command people and give clear orders. They gain fame through spiritual practices and study. In life they achieve everything by themselves.
Kings by nature; fame comes through intuition, so be sure to listen to your feelings. There is no middle ground for them — either at the top or at the bottom; categorical, ambitious, with strong pride, a sense of their own superiority and rivalry; talented and fortunate people who can lead others.
3811: A sign of royal renown. If there is no 7 in the matrix, they reach great heights. When there is a 7, they often choose a path that is not their own, displaying calmness and infantilism. A person who leaves a mark behind them, like Pushkin, like Tsiolkovsky — that is, many talented writers; for them there is no middle path, either victors or failures; ambitious, possessing a strong sense of pride and superiority; talented and fortunate, much falls to them from the heavens; they always compete with everyone and can also lead people.
3912:
People destined to leave their mark on this planet. This may be through creativity or teaching.
These are people who leave a mark behind them; there is no middle path, a victor or a failure; categorical and ambitious, with a sense of strong pride, of their own superiority and rivalry; talented, energetic, an analyst, able to lead people.

The person will go to any length for their own gain. They have a natural gift for the mastery of oratory. Great dreamers, goal-oriented, focused on results, able to lie with virtuosity. With those around them, attentive.
Tactful, practical, magnificent salespeople, they can wriggle out of any situation, and they are virtuosos at it; they can constantly come up with something, dreamers. Inventors — they could dream up a brilliant science-fiction film or cartoons.

If there are a 3 and a 5, leanings toward mathematics, logic, singing. People who fear nothing. Open-hearted in their interactions, good friends, devoted employees, great dreamers, adventurers; as they say, such people are priceless, beneficial to society.

The higher above 1000 the sign is, the stronger the amplification of ambition and pride becomes.
The 1000 signs are like kings on a throne, proud and haughty; they may consider other people beneath them, they love to subjugate others, born leaders, they always steer the situation; among the 1000 there are many talented and successful people, but if unrealized, they may go into decline — becoming drunkards, drug addicts; they can convince themselves of much, because unrealized pride disrupts and destroys everything.
